paragraph: South Hackensack's market is defined almost entirely by multi-family properties, with five sales over the last six months at a median of $755,500. These homes are selling above list, with a sale-to-list ratio of 1.04 and a median of 18 days on market. This is a real seller's market for the multi-family category. Prices range from $625,000 to $970,000, and one property closed in 12 days, which underscores how quickly the right home moves here. If you're looking at multi-family in South Hackensack, understand that sellers are dictating terms and competitive bidding is a real possibility on homes that are priced right. The tight inventory and rapid absorption make pricing strategy crucial. Single-family and condo activity is minimal to nonexistent in the rolling window, so if either of those property types is what you're after, you'll want to expand your search to nearby towns where those categories have deeper supply and more comparable sales to anchor your decision.
